query: I need to figure out what tests to write for our new payment processing module. It handles Stripe webhooks and has a lot of edge cases around idempotency and retry logic.
expected_behavior: Agent recognizes this as a test design task and activates test-architect
Agent enters design mode for the payment processing module
Agent identifies security-sensitive code requiring thorough coverage
Agent maps edge cases: idempotency, retry logic, webhook verification
Agent recommends integration tests for Stripe webhook handling
Agent suggests property-based testing for idempotency invariants
Agent does NOT run tests or modify source code
